title: CMI offers tutorials during technical meeting to encourage discussion among CMI Team members
description: CMI researchers conducted the activity for this highlight
text:
CMI researchers from Ames National Laboratory conducted the activity for this highlight
Achievement
During the CMI Annual Meeting, three tutorial sessions were offered to CMI team members meeting attendees as professional development. The sessions were:
Harnessing GenAI to Accelerate Scientific Research, presented by Nancy Washton, Pacific Northwest National Laboratory, and Ihor Hlova, Ames National Laboratory
Process Optimization and Modeling for Minerals Sustainability (PROMMIS), presented by Alejandro Garciadiego and Marcus Holly, National Energy Technology Laboratory
TAOS – The Alloy Optimization Software, presented by Aurelien Perron and Brandon Bocklund, Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
